'''Basz Maliyu''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]].

Basz Maliyu was known for his ease around [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Officer/Legends|officers]], which spawned a number of stories and suspicions. Some believed him to have once been an Imperial [[Slavery/Legends|slave]], while others believed he befriended Imperial officers to avoid undesirable [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|customs]] difficulties on his smuggling runs. These suspicions caused many to believe that Maliyu informed the Empire of [[Syvris shadowport]]'s location. Following its destruction, he was shunned by the smuggler and [[Fringer/Legends|fringer]] community.

==Behind the scenes==
Basz Maliyu was the first Mon Calamari character to be given two names, predating the introduction of [[Jesmin Ackbar]] by several months. Previously, Mon Calamari were generally assumed by fans to not have family names.
